title: API name problem
excerpt: I am an implementer, and I am currently establishing connections with multiple companies. I have developed an application, and it works very well. However, I encountered a problem: the API names on the dashboard vary acr…

posts.author: aaronchen (aaron)
posts.cookedHtml: I am an implementer, and I am currently establishing connections with multiple companies. I have developed an application, and it works very well. However, I encountered a problem: the API names on the dashboard vary across different company environments. How can I standardize the API names on the dashboard?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @aaronchen,

I replied to you in the request you opened

posts.author: aaronchen (aaron)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can specify the ID of the column when you create it as explained here by passing the “id” parameter.

mutation {
create_column(
board_id: 7588079605
title: “My text column”
column_type: text
id: “text123”
) {
id
}
}
